blended.narrative: Greek Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,181 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 37°F.
